revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update flag aliases
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Lebanon | flag alias = Flag of Lebanon.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Lebanese Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Lebanese Air Force | flag alias-army = Flag of the Lebanese Armed Forces (Front).svg | link alias-army = Lebanese Ground Forces | flag alias-navy = Drapeau de Forces Navales Libanaises.jpg | link alias-navy = Lebanese Navy | flag alias-naval = Naval Jack of Lebanon.gif | link alias-naval = Lebanese Navy | flag alias-c. 17th century = Chehab Emirate Flag.png | flag alias-1697 = Cedar flag.svg | flag alias-1918 = Cedar flag.svg | flag alias-1920 = Lebanese French flag.svg | flag alias-1920a = Flag of the French Mandate of Syria (1920).svg | flag alias-1920b = Lebanese French flag.svg | flag alias-1920c = Flag of Lebanon during French Mandate (1920-1943) 2.svg | flag alias-1920d = Flag of Lebanon during French Mandate (1920-1943) 3.svg | flag alias-1943 = Flag of Lebanon (1943-1995).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = c. 17th century | var2 = 1697 | var3 = 1918 | var4 = 1920 | var5 = 1920a | var6 = 1920b | var7 = 1920c | var8 = 1920d | var9 = 1943 | redir1 = LBN | redir2 = LIB </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Lebanon here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Lebanon for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Lebanon | flag alias = Flag of Lebanon.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Lebanese Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Lebanese Air Force | flag alias-army = Flag of the Lebanese Armed Forces (Front).svg | link alias-army = Lebanese Ground Forces | flag alias-navy = Drapeau de Forces Navales Libanaises.jpg | link alias-navy = Lebanese Navy | flag alias-naval = Naval Jack of Lebanon.gif | link alias-naval = Lebanese Navy | flag alias-c. 17th century = Chehab Emirate Flag.png | flag alias-1697 = Cedar flag.svg | flag alias-1918 = Cedar flag.svg | flag alias-1920 = Lebanese French flag.svg | flag alias-1920a = Flag of the French Mandate of Syria (1920).svg | flag alias-1920b = Lebanese French flag.svg | flag alias-1920c = Flag of Lebanon during French Mandate (1920-1943) 2.svg | flag alias-1920d = Flag of Lebanon during French Mandate (1920-1943) 3.svg | flag alias-1943 = Flag of Lebanon (1943-1995).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = c. 17th century | var2 = 1697 | var3 = 1918 | var4 = 1920 | var5 = 1920a | var6 = 1920b | var7 = 1920c | var8 = 1920d | var9 = 1943 | redir1 = LBN | redir2 = LIB </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
